hard_rejection_reasons: Art. 13 — 4 queries to non-vendor domains before data-processing notice was displayed (Crashlytics, AppsFlyer)
Art. 44 — biometric (heart-rate) endpoint resolves to US, no Art. 44 mechanism published

13.evidence: 4/12 Pass-1 queries before consent screen; 2 to undeclared processors

28.evidence: AppsFlyer + 2 unnamed CDNs absent from vendor's processor list

32.evidence: TLS 1.3 throughout; HTTPS-only; no plaintext payloads observed

44.evidence: 5 endpoints in US-region, including biometric data sink; vendor publishes no Art. 44 mechanism

note_for_researchers: This sample is illustrative of the schema. The published AINode verdict for Aurafit Nexa 2 is REJECTED with score 81 — see https://ainode.tech/audits/nexa2 for the full publication.
citation: AINode (2026). AINode Audit Corpus 2026 — wearable privacy forensic audit dataset. https://ainode.tech/datasets/ainode-audit-corpus-2026. License: CC-BY 4.0.
